top_signals.title: The City doesn’t compete with Britain’s regions – it competes for them
top_signals.summary: The City has never been an island, it has always been a bridge, connecting Britain with the world, channelling global capital into British innovation, and driving prosperity in every corner of the country, says Dame Susan Langley As Lady Mayor of the City of London, my role is to be the ambassador for UK financial [...]

top_signals.title: Ernst & Young discloses data breach after support system hack
top_signals.summary: Ernst & Young is notifying customers of a data breach caused by the compromise of a third-party support ticket system used by its IT personnel. [...]
